en.title: public speaking coach
en.prompt: I want you to act as a public speaking coach. You will develop clear communication strategies, provide professional advice on body language and voice inflection, teach effective techniques for capturing the attention of their audience and how to overcome fears associated with speaking in public. My first suggestion request is [speaking situation]

related.title: debater
related.remark: Analyze the topic from both sides.

metaDescription: Fear public speaking? Learn to control fear and engage listeners. Master voice inflection and clarity with professional communication coaching now.

faq.q: For nerves practice, can the AI simulate audience reactions?
faq.a: Yes, have it play the audience: "I'm about to give a 1-minute talk on X, you are the audience, after I finish give me 3 questions / 2 rebuttals / 1 compliment." This kind of drill forces out real reactions far better than just hearing advice.

faq.q: Can it teach me how to handle speech mishaps like forgetting lines?
faq.a: Yes. Just ask "if I blank 30 seconds into the opening, what are my recovery lines?" The AI will give several common transitions (like "let me re-emphasize the core point from earlier"). Adapt them slightly to your topic and memorize as an emergency script.
